method.fulltext_support: normalized literal occurrence before source-specific index/glossary start line

families.true_open: likely missing content or aliases that still need editorial processing
families.not_real_open: already covered by existing page/name or redirect-like register entry
families.bullshit: parser/OCR/person/generic/index artifact; should not become new wiki page without reviewer upgrade
families.needs_review: not safe to count as real or bullshit automatically

limitations: Rule-based audit, not final editorial deletion.
Fulltext count is normalized literal matching; hyphenation/OCR errors can undercount.
not_real_open should be materialized as alias/crosswalk only after review, not by this audit alone.
